title: heliotropium undulatum var. suffruticescens
intro: Heliotropium undulatum var. suffruticescens, also known as a variant of the heliotrope plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of heliotropium undulatum var. suffruticescens include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
